title: Anatomy of a Simple Java Class
description: A visual breakdown of the core components that make up a class in Java, showing how they relate to each other to form a blueprint for objects.
relationships: The Class Name acts as the blueprint's identifier
Instance Variables define the state or data that each object created from the class will possess
Methods define the actions or behaviors that the objects can perform
The Constructor is a special method used to initialize new objects when they are created
